design_system.name: Swiss Digital Bureau
design_system.description: A precision-engineered visitor management system inspired by Swiss design principles—clean, grid-based, and highly legible. Optimized for tablet touch interaction.

public_form.background: Split layout: Left 1/3 Pattern/Brand, Right 2/3 Form (Desktop) or Full Screen Card (Mobile/Tablet)
public_form.animation: Slide-in from right for new steps

admin_dashboard.header: Sticky top bar with user profile and quick actions

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95
variants.outline: border border-input bg-background shadow-sm hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-11 px-8 rounded-md
variants.whatsapp: bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 gap-2 flex items-center justify-center font-medium rounded-full

Card.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm

Input.style: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-base shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

CameraCapture.description: A dedicated component for capturing visitor photos
features: Live preview with 'Frame Face' overlay (dashed border)

StatusToggle.style: Green (Hadir) vs Gray/Red (Tidak Hadir) pill toggle

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. DATABASE: Initialize Supabase client in 'src/lib/supabase.js'. Create tables: 'visitors' (id, created_at, name, phone, agency, purpose, official_id, photo_url, followers_count), 'officials' (id, name, position_id, status, is_available), 'positions' (id, title).
4. FORM: Build the visitor form as a multi-step process or a clean long-scroll card. Focus on large inputs for tablet users. Camera capture is CRITICAL.
5. DASHBOARD: The admin dashboard must auto-refresh or use Supabase realtime subscription for new visitors.
6. WHATSAPP: The visitor table must generate a wa.me link: `https://wa.me/${phone}?text=Hello ${name}, ...`
7. STYLE: Use the defined 'Swiss Digital Bureau' theme. Strict whitespace, high contrast text.
8. MOCK: If Supabase credentials are missing, mock the data layer but build the full UI structure.
universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for text.
DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings if possible, but if constrained, use 'font-bold tracking-tight'.
Add 'data-testid' to all inputs and buttons.
Mobile First: Ensure the form works perfectly on a 375px width screen.
